_comment_setup_step_1: FIRST: Run 'npx kallyai-mcp-server --setup' to authenticate with Firebase
_comment_setup_step_2: THEN: Copy the 'mcpServers' section below to your Claude Desktop config
_comment_setup_step_3: FINALLY: Restart Claude Desktop to load the KallyAI tools

kallyai._description: KallyAI Phone Assistant - Make AI-powered phone calls through Claude
kallyai._note_1: This uses npx to always run the latest published version from npm
kallyai._note_2: The -y flag auto-confirms npx prompts for a smoother experience
kallyai._troubleshooting_1: If tools don't appear: Check Claude Desktop logs or try restarting
kallyai._troubleshooting_2: If auth fails: Run 'npx kallyai-mcp-server --setup' again
kallyai._troubleshooting_3: If calls fail: Verify Firebase auth and API permissions

_alternative_local_dev: For local development, use this command instead:
_usage_example: After setup, you can say: 'Call the restaurant at (555) 123-4567 and make a reservation for 2 people at 7pm'
